calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-24-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-29-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stacie Nelson appeared by zoom for Silvia Pybus (Petitioner).

The court noted that there are a few wrinkles in the petition and informed Ms. Nelson that ordinarily if there are any liabilities and it has an out of state personal representative, it requires a bond. Ms. Nelson requested that the court order a minimum bond, stated that the parents are the only two heirs, that the father has waived bond and that the hope is that the court would consider a smaller bond given the likely size of this estate. The court understands that the parties haven't been able to ascertain information because the banks are requiring letters, but noted that ordinarily bond would be for the amount of the liabilities. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Silvia P. Pybus is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $58,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for January 24, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
